testcase.name: test_get_users_success

error.message: failed on setup with "sqlalchemy.exc.OperationalError: (sqlite3.OperationalError) database is locked [SQL: INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, hashed_password, hashed_pin, legacy_external_contact_id, first_name, last_name, phone_number, address, notes, skills, availability, role, status, is_active, site_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
